name: @wuphf/desktop
description: WUPHF v1 desktop shell — Electron main + preload + React renderer. Sandboxed renderer, contextBridge typed allowlist (OS verbs only), utilityProcess.fork() broker spawning. No app-data IPC; the renderer reaches the broker over loopback HTTP/SSE.

dependencyOverrideNotes.vite: Keeps desktop Vitest's Vite dependency on the same major as the desktop build toolchain.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.renderer.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.e2e.json
scripts.lint: biome check src/ tests/ e2e/ scripts/
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src/ tests/ e2e/ scripts/
scripts.format: biome format --write src/ tests/ e2e/ scripts/
scripts.check: biome check src/ tests/ e2e/ scripts/
